benchmarks.name: coremark
benchmarks.notes: Current CoreMark image is built with -DITERATIONS=1. CoreMark/MHz is reported only when the benchmark emits STOP, validation flags are clean, tohost reports PASS, legacy loop-buffer activity is zero, and standalone decoded-op replay activity is zero.

benchmarks.name: dhrystone
benchmarks.notes: Dhrystone writes timed mcycle/minstret deltas to the benchmark result block before PASS; scoreable rows require legacy loop-buffer activity and standalone decoded-op replay activity to remain zero.
